commands: vite-plus run hello # create caches for 'echo foo' and 'echo bar'
jaq -i '.scripts.hello = "echo baz && echo bar"' package.json # update the first subcommand
vite-plus run hello # should report cache miss of the first subcommand, and hit cache of the second subcommand
jaq -i '.scripts.hello = "echo bar"' package.json # remove the first subcommand, now the second subcommand becomes the first
vite-plus run hello # can still hit cache even the subcommand index changed
